properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Ulkoria is not unlocked with this skin. Ulkoria can only be unlocked by completing The Gargoyle - the second Variant of the Alterdeep adventure in the Waterdeep: Dragon Heist Campaign.

backstory.original: Ulkoria has defended Waterdeep with her magic more times than she can recall. She is a well-respected member of the Watchful Order, often working closely with The Blackstaff on the city's defense. Known only as 'the Gargoyle' by most, her face often locks into a scowl of concentration. Few have withstood her withering stares without relenting.
backstory.display: 乌尔科莉亚用魔法保卫深水城的次数，多得她已记不清。她是守望者教团中备受尊敬的成员，经常与黑杖密切合作，共同保卫城市。大多数人只知道她的称号是“石像鬼”，她经常一脸凝重，很少有人能经受得住她枯燥的凝视而不动摇。

description.original: Ulkoria summons 3 magic missiles and fires them at random targets
description.display: 乌尔科莉亚召唤 3 发魔法飞弹并向随机目标发射。

longDescription.original: Ulkoria summons 3 magic missiles and fires them at random targets (each missile deals 33% of her DPS)
longDescription.display: 乌尔科莉亚召唤 3 发魔法飞弹并向随机目标发射（每发飞弹的伤害相当于她 33% 的每秒伤害值）。

description.original: Ulkoria's Shield Guardian steps up behind the formation and casts Lightning Bolt.
description.display: 乌尔科莉亚的盾卫者进入阵型后方，施放闪电束。

longDescription.original: Ulkoria's Shield Guardian steps up behind the formation and casts Lightning Bolt once for each stack of Spellcaster School that Ulkoria has. Lightning Bolt targets a random enemy and deals massive damage to all enemies in a line.
longDescription.display: 乌尔科莉亚的盾卫者进入阵型后方，乌尔科莉亚每有一层魔法学校堆叠层数，它就会施放一发闪电束。闪电束会瞄准一名随机敌人，并对一条直线上的所有敌人造成高额伤害。

description.desc: Ulkoria gains a stack of Spellcaster School for each Champion with a magical base attack in the formation. Each stack increases the damage of these Champions by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位以法术为基本攻击方式的勇士，乌尔科莉亚就获得一层魔法学校堆叠。每层堆叠会提升以法术为基本攻击方式的勇士们 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠

tipText.original: Ulkoria's abilities gets stronger when there are more spellcasters in the formation.
tipText.display: 阵型中的施法者越多，乌尔科莉亚的技能越强。

description.desc: Increases the damage of everyone in the formation by $(amount)% if you are on an adventure in the Waterdeep: Dragon Heist campaign.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the Damage of $target by $amount% if you are on an adventure in the Waterdeep: Dragon Heist campaign.

description.desc: 如果你正在“深水城：龙金之劫”战役中冒险，则阵型中的所有人提升 $(amount)% 伤害

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 如果你正在“深水城：龙金之劫”战役中冒险，则使$target的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Ulkoria is at home in the streets and alleys of Waterdeep and increases everyone's damage when you start adventures there.
tipText.display: 乌尔科莉亚在深水城的大街小巷中如鱼得水。从那里开始冒险时，所有人的伤害都会提高。

description.desc: Ulkoria provides additional buffs based on the number of Spellcaster School stacks she has.^3+ stacks: Attack speeds of Champions counting towards Spellcaster School are reduced by $(amount___2) sec.^5+ stacks: Increase the positional formation ability effects of Champions counting towards Spellcaster School by $(amount___3)% for each stack.^7+ stacks: Each time a Champion counting towards Spellcaster School attacks there is a $(chance___4)% chance that their base attack cooldown will immediately reset.^9+ stacks: Increase the base value of Spellcaster School by 200%.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the potency of $target's Formation Abilities by $amount% for each Champion with a magical base attack.
After $target attacks with their Base Attack, $target has $(chance)% to refresh that attack's Cooldown.
Increases the base value of Spellcaster School by 200%

description.desc: 乌尔科莉亚基于自身拥有的魔法学校堆叠层数提供额外增益。^堆叠 3 层以上：受魔法学校影响的勇士攻击速度缩减 $(amount___2) 秒。^堆叠 5 层以上：每层堆叠为受魔法学校影响的勇士提升阵型技能效果 $(amount___3)%^堆叠 7 层以上：每位受魔法学校影响的勇士攻击时，有 $(chance___4)% 几率立即重置基本攻击冷却时间。^堆叠 9 层以上：魔法学校的基本效果提升 200%

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 阵型中每有一位使用魔法基本攻击的勇士，使$target的阵型技能效果提高 $amount%。
$target使用基本攻击后，$target有 $(chance)% 几率重置基本攻击冷却时间。
“魔法学校”的基础效果数值提高 200%

specializationDescription.original: Ulkoria summons her Shield Guardian as her ultimate attack, dealing massive damage for each stack of Spellcaster School she has.
specializationDescription.display: 乌尔科莉亚召唤她的盾卫者作为杀招攻击。她的每层魔法学校都会造成巨大伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Ulkoria's urchin friends (Nat, Jenks, and Squiddy) appear during her ultimate attack, knocking back and stunning enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 乌尔科莉亚的顽童朋友（纳特、詹克斯和斯奎迪）在她发动杀招时出现，击退并眩晕敌人。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"add_attack_targets,1,310","description":"Increases the number of Missiles fired by Ulkoria's Magic Missiles by $amount"}
{"effect_string":"add_attack_targets,1,310","description":"Increases the number of Missiles fired by Ulkoria's Magic Missiles by $amount"}

name.original: Buff Watchful Order (3 stack); feat only
name.display: 强化守望者教团（3层）。仅限专长

name.original: Buff Watchful Order (5 stack); feat only
name.display: 强化守望者教团（5层）。仅限专长

description.original: It's the right thing to do.
description.display: 这是应该做的正确的事。

description.original: When your city is under siege, the Order has but one duty. Defend it.
description.display: 当你的城市被围攻时，教团只有一个职责，那就是守卫城市。

description.original: YES! Utilize the weave. Outthink your opponent.
description.display: 是的！利用魔网，在思维上超越你的对手。

description.original: Feel the power flow through you.
description.display: 感受力量流经你的身体。

description.original: The Watchful Order includes all spellcasters living in Waterdeep.
description.display: 守望者教团包括深水城里居住的所有咒术师。

effects.description: Increases the base attack cooldown reduction of Watchful Order by 40%

description.original: We can have the Order at our backs in moments. Just say the word.
description.display: 我们只要开口，就可以瞬间让教团出现在我们身后。

effects.description: Increases the positional formation buff of Watchful Order by 40%

description.original: This city is my home, for better or worse.
description.display: 无论怎样，这座城市是我的家。

description.original: I protect those I care about most.

effects.description: Ulkoria may be used in any Waterdeep: Dragon Heist campaign adventure when a patron is enabled, regardless of any restrictions.

description.original: You should do something every day to get you closer to your next goal!
description.display: 你应该每天做点事来让自己离下一个目标更近一点！

effects.description: Increases the positional formation buff of Watchful Order by 80%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Ulkoria has defended Waterdeep with her magic more times than she can recall. She is a well-respected member of the Watchful Order, often working closely with The Blackstaff on the city's defense. Known only as 'the Gargoyle' by most, her face often locks into a scowl of concentration. Few have withstood her withering stares without relenting.

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Ulkoria is not unlocked with this skin. Ulkoria can only be unlocked by completing The Gargoyle - the second Variant of the Alterdeep adventure in the Waterdeep: Dragon Heist Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 乌尔科莉亚用魔法保卫深水城的次数，多得她已记不清。她是守望者教团中备受尊敬的成员，经常与黑杖密切合作，共同保卫城市。大多数人只知道她的称号是“石像鬼”，她经常一脸凝重，很少有人能经受得住她枯燥的凝视而不动摇。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士乌尔科莉亚不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“石像鬼”——“深水城：龙金之劫”战役中“变幻深渊”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁乌尔科莉亚。
